title: Oxymeris melanodesma
taxonomy: Oxymeris melanodesma is a species of sea snail, specifically a species of cone snail. It belongs to the family Conidae, which is a large family of marine gastropod mollusks. Conidae is further divided into several genera, and Oxymeris melanodesma is one of the species within the Oxymeris genus. The classification of Oxymeris melanodesma is as follows: Kingdom: Animalia, Phylum: Mollusca, Class: Gastropoda, Order: Neogastropoda, Family: Conidae, Genus: Oxymeris, Species: O. melanodesma. This classification reflects the snail's unique characteristics and its relationship to other marine snails.
